dataset_name: GSE250487 anti-integrin UC colon biopsy scRNA-seq
study_name: UC colon biopsy scRNA-seq from anti-integrin single-cell/spatial multi-omics study
repository_type: Public processed archive; controlled raw archive
publication_title: Single-cell and spatial multi-omics highlight effects of anti-integrin therapy across cellular compartments in ulcerative colitis
study_design: Anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multi-omics study; colon biopsy scRNA-seq component
potential_use_cases: Anti-integrin therapy effects; UC single-cell reference; colon biopsy immune/epithelial/stromal states; treatment-response biology
limitations: Family anchor row for matched assay components DS115 and DS116; public GEO processed data available but raw sequencing/phenotype data are controlled in dbGaP; spatial component is publication-linked but not represented by this subseries
data_access_status: Public processed data; Controlled raw data
notes: Remapped from compact single-cell/spatial plan after clinical rows occupied DS109-DS113. Use as the counting anchor for the GSE250498 anti-integrin UC family; DS115/DS116 are matched assay/tissue components.
verification_notes: Verified from top single-cell/spatial candidate review. GEO SuperSeries GSE250498 should be split by public subseries: GSE250487 biopsy scRNA-seq, GSE250488 blood scRNA-seq, and GSE250490 biopsy CITE-seq. dbGaP phs003502.v1.p1 is the shared controlled raw companion accession.
overlap_notes: Family anchor for anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multi-omics study. Public processed GEO data are available for biopsy scRNA-seq; raw data are controlled in dbGaP companion accession phs003502.v1.p1. DS115 and DS116 should be treated as matched assay/tissue components rather than independent cohorts.

study_name: Multi-omic characterisation of PBMCs in IBD
omics_layer: Single-nucleus multiome; Single-nucleus transcriptomics; Single-nucleus ATAC-seq
platform: 10x Genomics Multiome; paired RNA and ATAC from same nuclei; Illumina NovaSeq 6000
study_design: PBMC stimulation multiome study with RPMI, LPS, and Salmonella conditions
sample_size_samples: 80 stimulation samples reported by EGA study; EGAD50000000198 lists 20 samples
potential_use_cases: IBD PBMC multiome; gene-regulatory target prioritization; stimulation response; blood immune-cell reference
limitations: Controlled EGA access only; publication linkage not found in public source check; study-level and dataset-level sample counts differ, so sample-size fields require conservative interpretation
notes: Controlled-access PBMC single-nucleus multiome row. Publication fields remain Unclear because no public publication link was confirmed in the EGA source check.
verification_notes: Verified from top single-cell/spatial candidate review. EGA reports 38 CD/UC patients, RPMI/LPS/Salmonella stimulation conditions, 10x droplet Multiome paired RNA+ATAC from same nuclei, and dataset EGAD50000000198. EGA study says 80 stimulation samples while the dataset page lists 20 samples.
overlap_notes: Controlled-access PBMC single-nucleus multiome row. Count as independent unless future overlap with an existing cohort is found.

dataset_name: GSE312415 IBD CosMx spatial transcriptomics benchmark
study_name: CosMx component of IBD spatial transcriptomics platform benchmark
publication_title: Performance differences in spatial transcriptomics platforms identify Treg biology in human inflammatory bowel disease
disease: Crohn disease; ulcerative colitis; non-diseased controls
study_design: Spatial transcriptomics platform benchmark; CosMx component
potential_use_cases: Spatial IBD atlas; platform benchmarking; Treg biology; tissue architecture; deconvolution/spatial validation
limitations: Sibling CosMx platform component of DS119/Xenium benchmark; subject/section overlap with Xenium sibling is not fully resolved from public metadata; do not count independently until platform-overlap policy is decided
data_access_status: Public raw/custom spatial files; Public GEO metadata
notes: GSE312415 source check confirms CosMx-specific 60-sample public GEO record with series-level supplementary TAR and BioProject PRJNA1373285. GEO citation field was missing at source-check time, but linkage to the Nature Communications benchmark is strong.
verification_notes: Incorporates GSE312415 direct source check: GEO title, GPL33484 NanoString CosMx SMI platform, 60 samples GSM9345400-GSM9345459, series package GSE312415_files.tar.gz, BioProject PRJNA1373285, and no SRA relation found.
overlap_notes: CosMx component of the IBD spatial transcriptomics platform benchmark. Same benchmark family as DS119/GSE312420 Xenium; public GEO evidence supports a CosMx-specific 60-sample record, but subject/section overlap with the Xenium sibling is not fully resolved from public metadata. Do not count independently until sibling-platform counting policy is decided.
